title: Align shared core tests with root pack defaults
summary: Moves generic shared-core portability tests to first-party root-pack defaults while preserving explicit externalization coverage.
scope_items: Update generic pack scaffold and bootstrap tests to use root-pack examples
Keep explicit externalization tests only where the topology itself is under test
done_when_items: Touched shared-core tests prove root-pack support directly
Externalized-pack coverage remains present where behavior depends on that topology
